title.ko: 확성기, 마이크, 축음기 픽업 또는 이와 유사한 음향 전기기계 변환기; 전기 보청기; 확성 시스템 (공급 주파수에 의해 결정되지 않는 주파수를 갖는 소리의 생성 G10K)
title.en: LOUDSPEAKERS, MICROPHONES, GRAMOPHONE PICK-UPS OR LIKE ACOUSTIC ELECTROMECHANICAL TRANSDUCERS; ELECTRIC HEARING AIDS; PUBLIC ADDRESS SYSTEMS  (producing sounds with frequency not determined by supply frequency G10K)

definition.ko: 변환기의 유형 자기회로가 있는 것: 가동코일형; 가동접극자형; 자성재료의 진동판; 자왜형 H04R9/00; H04R11/00; H04R13/00; H04R15/00 자기회로가 없는 것: 압전형; 정전형; 가변저항형 H04R17/00; H04R19/00; H04R21/00 기타 형식 H04R23/00 세부 일반; 회로; 진동판 및 콘(cone) H04R1/00; H04R3/00; H04R7/00 응용 입체음향 장치; 전기 보청기; 확성 시스템 H04R5/00; H04R25/00; H04R27/00 모니터링, 시험; 제조 H04R29/00; H04R31/00

title.ko: 변환기의 세부(진동판 H04R 7/00, 변환기의 특성에 의해 특징지워 지는 것, 메인 그룹 H04R 9/00～ H04R 23/00의 관련그룹을 찾을 것; 헬멧에 라디오셋트나 통신시스템을 설치한것 A42B 3/30; 전화설비를 위하여 특히 적합한 실장구 H04M 1/02)
title.en: Details of transducers (diaphragms H04R0007000000;characterised by the nature of the transducer, see the relevant group of main groups H04R0009000000-H04R0023000000;mountings specially adapted for telephone equipment H04M0001020000)

title.en: Casings; Cabinets; Mountings therein (H04R0001280000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 마이크와 그를 위한 전기회로와의 구조적 결합 (전기 보청기에서 H04R25/00)

Sanitary or hygienic devices for mouthpieces or earpieces, e.g. for protecting against infection

Holders for styli; Mounting holders on transducers

title.ko: 소망의 주파수특성 또는 지향특성을 얻기 위한 배치(스테레오 목적을 위한 것 H04R 5/00; 음성신호처리에 의한 음성향상 G10L 21/02)
title.en: Arrangements for obtaining desired frequency or directional characteristics (for stereophonic purposes H04R0005000000)
for obtaining desired frequency characteristic only
Structural combinations of separate transducers or of parts of the same transducer and responsive respectively to two or more frequency ranges

Combinations of transducers with horns, e.g. with mechanical matching means
for obtaining desired directional characteristic only
by using a single transducer with sound reflecting, diffracting, directing or guiding means
by using a single aperture of dimensions not greater than the shortest operating wavelength
in which sound waves act upon both sides of a diaphragm and incorporating acoustic phase-shifting means, e.g. pressure-gradient microphone
by combining a number of identical transducers
Combinations of transducers with fluid-pressure or other non-electrical amplifying means
Special adaptations for subaqueous use, e.g. for hydrophone
